subcodes.first_line: O dear friend! From the threshold of the All-Glorious Beauty do I entreat and supplicate that He may render thee dear in both worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز از درگاه جمال ابهی تمنا و رجا مینمایم که ترا عزیز دو جهان نماید و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
